hypothesis: Conditioning a CVAE on the presence of Si and Li, a target capacity >1500 mAh/g, and a large stable Li-channel radius will produce novel Li–Si–X crystal structures that, after CHGNet relaxation, maintain computed gravimetric capacities >1500 mAh/g and retain large continuous Li+ migration channels between charged and discharged states (Rt nearly constant), indicating their suitability as silicon‑based anode materials.
